title: Adding a counter to the notifications pane
excerpt: Would be great if there was a counter on the popout notifications panel, so you could tell how many there are without scrolling and counting. Not just unread but all. Especially when you return from leave and there could…

posts.author: VeronicaK (Veronica Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be great if there was a counter on the popout notifications panel, so you could tell how many there are without scrolling and counting. Not just unread but all. Especially when you return from leave and there could be dozens and dozens so you can plan how to tackle them.

(Apologies if this has been flagged before - I’m new here and couldn’t find it had been covered.)
